# Freyr Technology AI Website Context

Freyr Technology AI presents itself as a high-performance computing service provider focused on advanced and customized computing resources for AI model training and inference. The public website is currently reduced to model pricing, privacy information, and terms of use.

## Website Purpose

The site is a static, no-database website for visitors reviewing model pricing and legal terms. The home page now presents the pricing experience directly; model catalog, API docs, and solutions pages redirect to pricing.

## Primary Content

The home Pricing page presents text, image, music, and video model pricing loaded from Freyr's public model info API. Text model prices are normalized from token cost fields; image, music, and video pricing is currently shown as negotiable. While live pricing is loading, the page displays loading states instead of built-in placeholder pricing.

Current public pricing categories are configured in `/config/model-categories.js`:

- Text: DeepSeek V4 Pro, DeepSeek V4 Flash, Qwen3.6 35B A3B FP8, and Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B Reasoning.
- Image: FLUX.2 Dev.
- Music: HeartMuLa OSS 3B Happy New Year.
- Video: LTX 2.3, Wan2.2 T2V A14B, and MOVA 360p.

Pricing display convention: positive text token costs are shown per 1M tokens. Zero, missing, or unavailable token costs are displayed as `Negotiable`.

The Privacy Policy page describes personal data processing for Freyr AI services.

The Terms of Use page describes the terms governing access to and use of Freyr AI services.

## Important Caveats

Model availability, official pricing, endpoint domains, authentication, API data retention, logging policies, and privacy promises must be confirmed by Freyr before production launch. Static browser code must not expose private API keys, signatures, or cloud-provider credentials.
